Title: Building a Digital Business
Summary: A self-paced course that takes a small business from offline to selling online — presence, e-commerce, payments, and a growth plan.

Title: Seed of Power Program: Micro & Small Business Growth Code
Summary: A self-paced 8-module program that helps micro and small business owners move from daily hustle to a scalable, systemized business — covering value proposition, market access, money discipline, customer experience, sales systems, digital marketing, KPI review, and personal sustainability.
